top_signals.title: “Moldova's place is in the European Union,” says President von der Leyen at the EU-Moldova Summit
top_signals.summary:
European Commission News Brussels, 25 Jun 2026 
President Ursula von der Leyen and President António Costa welcomed Moldovan President Maia Sandu to Brussels on 22 June for the second EU-Moldova Summit. The ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
